candidates.name: PDA-Anchored ALG-LAM-PEDOT Electrode-Window Interphase
candidates.near_term_test: Add one anchored lead article to H-B electrochemical/physical stability only after the acellular H-A blank passes for the unanchored low-dose lead.
candidates.scope_lock_action: Lock the PDA/primer chemistry, electrode-window mask, extract-blank fields, and single-coupon H-A/H-B rescue trigger before any live-cell work.

candidates.name: All-Dry Zwitterionic Gradient External-Fluidic Coating
candidates.near_term_test: Run as a coating-on-housing comparator after ZRC-ND Phase A sentinel defines whether adsorption/fouling is the limiting failure mode.
candidates.scope_lock_action: Lock coated-surface placement, fouling/adsorption readouts, extract-blank fields, and ZRC Phase A trigger before procurement or coating outreach.

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Primer chemistry, MEA substrate, mask/window geometry, and hydrogel article identity are fixed before any measurement package is released.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Lock primer and electrode-window identity

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Blank article has pH, osmolality, conductivity, visible shedding, swelling, delamination, and transparency fields mapped to source files.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Define primer extract blank

tasks.acceptance_criterion: 1 kHz impedance, charge-storage proxy, impedance drift, and window-occlusion notes are listed as conditional H-B fields.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Bind H-B rescue electrochemical fields

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Candidate can only advance if primary H-A is clean enough and measured failure mode points to delamination, adhesion, or window instability.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Record rescue trigger boundary

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Substrate, coating location, uncoated comparator, and membrane/housing exposure boundary are fixed before outreach or purchase.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Lock coated surface placement

tasks.acceptance_criterion: pH, osmolality, conductivity, turbidity/visible residue, and extractable-risk notes are mapped to source-backed fields.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Define extract and medium integrity blank

tasks.acceptance_criterion: BSA or albumin adsorption, BDNF/proxy recovery, flow resistance drift, and post-soak inspection are listed as required comparator fields.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Bind fouling and protein recovery readouts

tasks.acceptance_criterion: Candidate can only advance if ZRC Phase A real data show adsorption, fouling, or housing-surface loss as a limiting failure mode.
tasks.claim_boundary: Scope-lock tasks define future source-backed measurements only; they are not measured evidence and cannot make a candidate suitable.
tasks.title: Record external-branch trigger boundary
